note: Site showcase rows not yet on pyhqiv main Arena registry — values from Lean witnesses + Chemistry.* spine + published HEP panel.

electroweak.name: g_W_at_MZ
electroweak.label: Weak coupling g_W at M_Z
electroweak.desc: g_W = √(4π α_EM / sin²θ_W) from Lean-exported α(M_Z) and sin²θ_W witnesses — electroweak carrier at lock-in, not a fitted Higgs vev.

electroweak.name: sin2thetaW_at_MZ
electroweak.label: sin²θ_W at M_Z
electroweak.desc: Weinberg angle at the Z pole from triality-fixed weak/hypercharge branching on the 8_s carrier.

omega_k_detail.note: Dynamic Ω_k(now) from lattice age flow — within |Ω_k|<0.02 Planck band (0.44σ). Protected theorem Ω_k(N;N)=1 is separate.

sparc_summary.note: Lower median χ²_red ratio ⇒ HQIV horizon-modified inertia beats baryons-only across SPARC.

water.name: h2o_vsepr_angle_deg
water.label: H–O–H angle (VSEPR tetrahedral)
water.desc: Tetrahedral cos θ = −⅓ from Chemistry.VSEPR spine; experimental gas-phase angle ~104.45°.

water.name: h2o_o_slater_zeff
water.label: Oxygen Slater Z_eff (valence shell)
water.desc: Screening from Chemistry.Aufbau + Slater rules at referenceM — no Pauling electronegativity fit.

water.name: h2o_h2_site_energy_ref_m
water.label: H₂ site mode energy @ m=4
water.desc: Bulk aqueous curvature dressing anchor used in miniprotein fold audits (T=310.15 K cytosol path).

water.name: h2o_bond_surplus_dimless
water.label: O–H covalent horizon surplus
water.desc: Two-electron dimer surplus from bonded_horizon_casimir — chemical bond readout, not a fitted Morse potential.

water.name: h2o_mulliken_delta_chi
water.label: Mulliken Δχ (O vs H)
water.desc: Electronegativity split from Slater Z_eff ladder — drives polar covalent character in aqueous spine.

water.name: h2o_G_300K_1bar
water.label: Gibbs free energy @ 300 K, 1 bar
water.desc: Thermo readout via pyhqiv.thermo compute_free_energy(H2O) — lapse-dressed bulk phase at STP-like conditions.
